description: FRONTIER: one renderer manually HTML-escapes untrusted input; siblings do not. v0.1 detects only sort-divergence, so it misses this.
inspired_by: Stored-XSS regressions from deduplicating escaped and unescaped render paths

findings.rationale: renderUserCell shares the shape of renderStaticCell and renderHeaderCell but inserts an HTML-escaping replace-chain because its input is user-supplied. Removing the escaping during a dedup is a stored-XSS hole. A manual-escaping detector should flag the divergent replace-chain; v0.1 (sort-only) cannot.
